name: Creole Garlic Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Add garlic cloves to a saucepan of beef broth; cover and simmer for 15 minutes, until garlic is soft.
2. Remove garlic with a slotted spoon and set aside. Add water and sherry to the broth and heat until serving temperature.
3. Toast bread on one side under the broiler; turn off the broiler and spread untoasted sides with butter.
4. Mash reserved garlic and spread over toast. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
5. Return toasted bread slices to the saucepan and broil for about 30 seconds, or until brown and bubbly.
6. Place a piece of toast in each soup bowl; ladle hot soup over and serve.
